description_long: This is a sculpted bust of a woman, rendered in a realistic style with delicate facial features and softly styled hair. The sculpture captures a serene and contemplative expression, with the head slightly tilted and the eyes gazing downward. The hair is parted and swept back in gentle waves, framing the face and extending to the nape of the neck. The bust is mounted on a simple, rounded base that supports the neck and shoulders. The surface has a matte, slightly rough finish, with visible textural details that suggest it is made from bronze or a similar metal. The coloration is predominantly brown with subtle variations, giving the piece a classic, timeless appearance.
description: A realistic bronze bust of a woman with softly styled hair and a contemplative expression, mounted on a rounded base. The surface is matte and textured, with brown coloration.
description_view_0: Side profile view highlighting the gentle waves of the hair and the elegant curve of the neck and jawline.
description_view_1: Frontal view showing the serene facial features, downward gaze, and symmetrical hair framing the face.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view emphasizing the back of the head and the sculpted hair's volume and flow.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the rounded shape of the head and the way the hair is styled around the base.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is neutral and does not indicate a specific setting.
